creator: kenji@k2r.org
text:
This problem has been solved by reinstalling Port
devel/p5-ExtUtils-Makemaker as suggested by sunpoet. Thanks.

On Tue, Oct 29, 2013 at 9:20 PM,  <FreeBSD-gnats-submit@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Thank you very much for your problem report.
> It has the internal identification `ports/183436'.
> The individual assigned to look at your
> report is: freebsd-ports-bugs.
>
> You can access the state of your problem report at any time
> via this link:
>
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=183436
